case_title: S AND C MOTORS INC VS BENEDETTI TOM

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BENEDETTI TOM

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF S AND C MOTORS INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BENEDETTI TOM $455.85 PRINCIPAL, $38.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $493.85, PAYMENTS TO BE MADE BI-WEEKLY $50 EVERY TWO WEEKS TOTALLING $100 PER MONTH STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $980.85 FILED BY S AND C MOTORS INC AS TO DEFENDANT BENEDETTI TOM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-19-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
